.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven release plugin temporary files to .gitignore to prevent committing build artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven plugin versions to use property placeholders for better maintainability.
Configure resource filtering to allow property substitution in resource files.
Replace the maven-javadoc-plugin with a workaround to create an empty javadoc jar for Sonatype compliance.
Upgrade JUnit to version 4.13.1 for test stability and security.
Upgrade WireMock to version 2.26.3 for test compatibility.
Remove Mockito dependency as it is no longer used in the test suite.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Implement pagination logic for fetching organizations
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: The new implementation handles large datasets by paginating requests using top/skip parameters
Code organization improvement, moving static constants out of instance scope

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add client version header to requests
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.why_exists: New requirement to identify client version in API calls

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add @JvmOverloads annotation to data class constructor to generate overloaded constructors for Java interoperability.
Make AltinnConfig parameter nullable with a default value to allow optional configuration.
Make ProxyConfig consumerId nullable to allow missing consumer IDs.
Add new data classes for Token, SelvbetjeningToken, TokenXToken, and Subject to support authentication models.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: interface Token { val value: String } data class SelvbetjeningToken(override val value: String): Token data class TokenXToken(override val value: String): Token data class Subject(val value: String)

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Rename AltinnOrganisasjon to AltinnReportee to better reflect that it can represent both organizations and individuals.
Add socialSecurityNumber field to AltinnReportee to support individual reportees.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: val status: String?, @JsonProperty("SocialSecurityNumber") val socialSecurityNumber: String?,

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Refactor class structure to use top-level functions and private constants instead of a companion object.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
private const val CORRELATION_ID_MDC_NAME = "correlationId"
fun getCorrelationId(): String = ...

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Introduce a helper function to safely execute an action with MDC context, ensuring cleanup in a finally block.
Add logic to search for correlation IDs in various standard MDC keys before generating a new UUID.
Replace the simple getter with a higher-order function that ensures a correlation ID exists in MDC during execution.
Simplify the remaining getCorrelationId function to just retrieve or generate a UUID without side effects.

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Remove Mockito runner and manual mocking of OIDC context in favor of direct token passing or simplified test setup.
Remove manual RestTemplate builder override used for testing HTTP calls.
Update client instantiation to remove OIDC context and RestTemplate builder dependencies, likely due to API changes in the client class.
Remove manual JWT token generation and OIDC validation context mocking from setUp.
Refactor test methods to use new API signature with explicit token and subject parameters instead of implicit context.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
klient.hentOrganisasjoner(
                selvbetjeningToken,
                Subject(FNR_INNLOGGET_BRUKER),
                ServiceCode(SYKEFRAVÆR_SERVICE_CODE),
                ServiceEdition(SERVICE_EDITION),
                true
        )

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Extract WireMock stubs and verifications into utility functions for cleaner test code.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after: wireMockServer.stubFor(`altinn-rettigheter-proxy returnerer 200 OK og en liste med AltinnReportees`(...))

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add new test cases for pagination and edge cases like bankruptcy responses.
src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.after:
@Test
    fun `hentOrganisasjoner() kaller AltinnrettigheterProxy flere ganger hvis bruker har tilgang til flere enn 499 virksomheter`() { ... }

src/test/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Disable WireMock console notifier to reduce test output noise.
